description: RESPONSIBILITIES:- Responsible for definition, design, construction, integration, testing, and support of reliable and reusable software solutions, addressing business opportunities. - Includes systems analysis, creation of specifications, coding, testing, and implementation of application programs and data interfaces.- Includes Java, JSP, J2EE, JDBC, EJB, JavaScript, C , Visual Basic, COM, DCOM, ActiveX, ASP, HTML, DHTML, XML, ColdFusion, Visual Age, WebSphere, .NET, etc.- Works with general supervision and follows established proceduresSKILLS/EXPERIENCE:- 1-3 years experience with Financial Services clients REQUIRED- 1-3 years experience with Salesforce.com development REQUIRED- Salesforce.com developer certification REQUIRED- Limited BSA experience (Data and Systems analysis) preferred- Understanding of the quality assurance and testing phases of projects- General knowledge of pertinent technologies- Basic skills in object, data, and / or process modeling, business process design (1-2 yrs.) - Understanding of Lean/Agile methodologies- Provides clear concise communication with project team members- Exposure to working with third parties and suppliers - , Experience not requiredADDITIONAL INFORMATION:- Need certified Salesforce.com developer for position in Northern Virginia Office- Need person willing/able to possibly convert to an associate after 3-month trial period- Person will need to be willing to ride the , shuttle to Richmond 2-4 times/month to meet with the extended team for Agile Planning sessions, etc.- Phone interview only- Person needs to be located in Northern VA no flexibility in location- No flexibility in rate card- Manager will be reviewing only a few resumes at a time
